name: button-group
description: Joins buttons (and/or nested groups, selects, input-groups) into a segmented control: a role=group flex box whose CSS collapses the shared inner rounding + borders between adjacent children (shadcn's ButtonGroup, horizontal or vertical). Pure layout over the children the caller passes in, no client state; focus-visible children raise their z-index so the ring is never clipped by a neighbour's border. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the button-group partial to your JTE root at lievit/button-group.jte, reached as @template.lievit.button-group(content=@`...`). Pass the buttons (or nested groups / selects / input-groups) as the content slot; they join seamlessly with collapsed inner rounding and shared borders. Set orientation="vertical" to stack on the vertical axis, and label for the group's aria-label (announced as one labelled group). Keyboard behaviour stays each child's own (Tab moves between them); a button-group is not a radio/toolbar, so no roving tabindex is imposed. The source is yours: edit freely.
